framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.note: 停火后IRGC袭击近零; 4月8日起停火; 较冲突峰值下降90%+; 偶发违规但无大规模交火
Extended ceasefire since Apr 8/21; last major IRGC kinetic wave mid-March; direct fire halted but strait blockade maintained by IRGC naval assets

history.est: ~2-5次/周(停火中，较战争初期下降>90%)
history.note: 4月8日巴基斯坦调停停火后频率大幅降低，停火多次违反；3月5日CENTCOM已报告弹道导弹↓90%、无人机↓83%；4月21日美国延长停火
停火自4/8延续，IRGC直接攻击近零；5/4 Project Freedom正式启动(15000人+100架+驱逐舰群)，伊朗顾问称违反停火；IRGC仍维持霍尔木兹海峡封锁+商船选择性扣押

history.est: ~0.2/天(停火D27;Project Freedom D1首批护航完成)
history.note: 停火自4/8延续(D27)；5/4 Project Freedom正式启动(15000人+100架+驱逐舰)，首批5艘超级油轮无事过境(沿阿曼侧)；启动前数小时英国船报告IRGC快艇蜂群骚扰近Sirik；伊朗顾问称护航违反停火；IRGC仍维持霍尔木兹海峡封锁+商船选择性扣押
停火D26(4/8生效→4/21无限期延长); IRGC弹道导弹近零; 5/3英国货船遭快艇袭扰(Sirik附近); Project Freedom 5/4启动首轮护航5艘超大油轮; 海峡海军执法选择性延续
停火自4/8延续D28; IRGC直接攻击近零; 5/3英国货船遭IRGC快艇骚扰(Sirik附近); 5/4 Project Freedom D1首批5超级油轮过境无事; 伊朗声称强迫美军舰撤退(CENTCOM否认); 13美军KIA总计
停火自4/8延续D29(4/21无限期延长); IRGC直接攻击近零; Project Freedom 5/4 D1首批5超级油轮完成过境(沿阿曼侧无事故); 5/3英国货船遭IRGC快艇骚扰(Sirik附近); 伊朗14点方案已提交美已回复; 13美军KIA
Project Freedom launch May 4 triggered fresh naval exchange; CENTCOM destroyed 6 Iranian boats; UAE intercepted 19 Iranian missiles/drones; ongoing mine threat in strait
IRGC shifted to maritime domain; attacked USS Truxtun+Mason May4(CENTCOM denied hits); 22 merchant ships attacked total since Feb28; fast boats+mines+drones active
ceasefire生效(4/8)后偶发违规；CENTCOM 5/4否认导弹击中美舰；Project Freedom(5/4)启动，伊朗警告违反停火；Hormuz区36起事件(30次攻击)累计
早期62波/天峰值已过；以色列称伊朗70%弹道导弹发射架被摧毁；5月4日伊朗声称击中美舰（CENTCOM否认）；IRGC仍有不对称海上行动能力
April 8 ceasefire in effect; Iran claimed missile hit US frigate May 4 (CENTCOM denied); 70%+ Iran ballistic launchers destroyed; IRGC capacity degraded but sporadic Hormuz harassment ongoing

history.est: ~0.5/day (ceasefire D29; May4 UAE flare-up contained; Project Freedom paused D2)
history.note: Ceasefire since Apr 8 extended indefinitely; Iran attacked UAE w/ drones+missiles May 4 (19 intercepted), CENTCOM sank 6 Iranian boats; Trump paused Project Freedom May 5 citing deal progress; Hegseth: ceasefire not over; 36 total Hormuz vessel incidents (30 attacks+6 near-miss)
4月30日14次过境(7入/7出); 伊朗4月17日宣布部分重开随即因以色列违规关闭; 约为战前~138/天的10%
Apr 30 data: 14 crossings (7in/7out); <10% of pre-war ~140/day; Iran charging M+ toll/ship; US naval blockade on Iranian ports since Apr 13; 22 ships attacked since war began
战前~100+艘/日(3000艘/月)；4月17日伊朗部分开放海峡，对中俄印等5国优先通行；约2000艘船只滞留波斯湾；4月30日仅14次通行(7进7出)
Apr30实测14次过境(7进7出)；战前~138/天基线约10%；Project Freedom 5/4启动目标恢复航行自由；伊朗仅允许中俄印伊拉克巴基斯坦通行；2000艘船困波斯湾

history.est: 12艘/天(5/2实测;Project Freedom D1首批5超级油轮过境)
history.note: 5/2实测12次过境(5进7出)，暗船活动+34.4%至176次(本轮最高)；Project Freedom 5/4首批5艘超级油轮已完成过境；海峡实际恢复极缓；战前~140艘/天，目前约8-9%
5/2: 12次(5进7出); 4/26低点2次; 封锁维持~95%封闭; Project Freedom 5/4首轮完成无事故; 预战均值100+/天; 中俄印等选择性过境仍允许
5/2实测12次过境(5进7出); 暗船活动+34.4%至176次(本轮最高); Project Freedom 5/4首批5超大油轮完成过境(沿阿曼侧); 战前~140艘/天约8-9%; 伊朗仍仅允许中俄印等5国通行; 2000艘船滞留湾区

history.est: ~12-17艘/天(Project Freedom D1首批完成;5/2基线12)
history.note: 5/2实测12次(5进7出); Project Freedom 5/4首批5超大油轮成功过境; 暗船活动5/2峰值176次(+34.4%本轮最高); 战前~140艘/天约8-12%恢复; 2000艘船滞留湾区; 伊朗仅允许中俄印伊拉克巴基斯坦通行
May 2 baseline (5 inbound, 7 outbound); Project Freedom first convoy (5 supertankers) underway May 5; 500-700 vessels stranded in Gulf; AIS-dark +34% to 176 events May 2
May2: 12 crossings(5in/7out); ProjectFreedom Day1 yielded only 2-4 vessels; dark vessel surge +34.4% to 176 events; pre-crisis baseline 50+/day
5/4实测11次过境(正常~120/天)；4月共191艘(-95%)；Project Freedom首批5艘超级油轮完成通行；500-700艘被困波斯湾
5月4日实测11次过境（5进6出），较前两周5-9艘轻微回升；Project Freedom首批5艘超大型油轮护航已完成；500-700艘大型船舶仍困于波斯湾

Project Freedom launched May 4; first 5-supertanker convoy completed under US escort; 36 vessel attacks since Feb 28; dual blockade structure (Iran blocks Hormuz, US Navy blockades Iranian ports from April 13)

May 4 data: 11 crossings (5 in+6 out); Project Freedom D1 convoy 5 supertankers passed Omani side without incident; dual blockade persists - Iran blocking strait + US blockading Iranian ports since Apr 13; 500-700 vessels stranded in Gulf

q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.findings: Wang Yi 26 calls + envoy Zhai Jun shuttle; China-Pakistan 5-point proposal (Mar31); China UN envoy May 1: Hormuz 'high on agenda' for Trump China visit; Trump cool on China mediation; MANPAD/BeiDou accusations add bilateral friction; signal: posturing not breakthrough

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Project Freedom launched May 4 (15K troops+100 aircraft+destroyers), then PAUSED May 5 by Trump citing 'very positive discussions'; Trump claims War Powers 'hostilities terminated' while CENTCOM sinking Iranian boats same week; Iran 14-pt vs US 9-pt proposals exchanged; maximum US signal contradiction - escort+negotiate simultaneously

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Iran 14-pt (May3) vs US 9-pt counter-offer; key gaps: Hormuz control mechanism (Iran wants new regime), zero enrichment (US) vs enrichment right (Iran), US forces withdrawal; Iran wants 30-day total resolution; UN sanctions draft circulating; ceasefire holding but no framework agreement

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: War Powers 60-day deadline hit May 1; Trump claims 'hostilities terminated' to sidestep; 5th Senate WPR vote 50-47 (Collins R-ME broke ranks first time); gas at $4.42/gallon (war-high +76% YoY, highest since war start); 13 KIA 428 total US casualties; Pentagon accused of casualty cover-up (Intercept); political cost ceiling approaching

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
